caption: Figure 1.6. Alien temporary work permits, Thailand
description: A bar chart showing the monthly number of alien temporary work permits in Thailand from January 2019 to January 2022. The values range between approximately 95,000 and 125,000.

caption: Figure 1.7. Non-citizen population in Malaysia (in thousands)
description: A bar chart showing the non-citizen population in Malaysia from 2016 to 2021. The population peaked in 2018 at 3,323,000 and declined to 2,693,000 by 2021.

caption: Figure 1.8. Singapore foreign workforce stock (in thousands)
description: A bar chart showing the Singapore foreign workforce stock in December of each year from 2016 to 2021. The stock peaked in 2019 at 1,427,000 and decreased to 1,200,000 by 2021.
